description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named build that handles repository pushes and pull requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: release, build, starcatcher-publish, and starcatcher-release. The release job checks out code, sets up Python 3.10, and creates a release. The build job runs on multiple OS and toolset combinations, building and uploading artifacts. The starcatcher-publish and starcatcher-release jobs handle publishing and releasing to a custom server.
